prompt_family_repairs.repair: Split step openers by casing to separate sentence-initial capitalization from mid-sentence usage.
Isolate sentence-case transition words to prevent mass dilution from lowercase variants.
Refine additive markers to distinguish between sentence-start and clause-internal positions.

qwen_validation_plan: Run tokenizer stability and base Qwen full-vocab mass scoring through Chimera Slurm.

repair_proposals.risk: Low risk; preserves natural instruction formatting.
repair_proposals.why_qwen_mass_may_improve: Separating capitalized step starters concentrates probability mass on tokens that strictly follow list delimiters.

repair_proposals.risk: Medium risk; may reduce coverage if sentence-case transitions appear mid-sentence.
repair_proposals.why_qwen_mass_may_improve: Isolating sentence-initial transitions allows the model to better predict capitalized tokens following terminal punctuation.

repair_proposals.risk: Low risk; targets common internal clause structures.
repair_proposals.why_qwen_mass_may_improve: Constraining additive markers to post-comma or parenthetical contexts aligns with their most frequent grammatical usage patterns.

proposal.summary: Three repair proposals split banks by casing and context to concentrate probability mass on specific token distributions.

prompt_family_repairs.repair: Standardize step openers to use infinitive verb forms to equalize base model verb-likelihood across buckets.

qwen_validation_plan: Run tokenizer stability and base Qwen full-vocab mass scoring through Chimera Slurm.

repair_proposals.risk: Verb frequency imbalance may persist even with infinitive standardization.
repair_proposals.why_qwen_mass_may_improve: Grouping verbs by similar base-model next-token likelihood reduces extreme mass ratio skew.

repair_proposals.risk: Splitting reduces per-bucket sample size, potentially lowering absolute mass.
repair_proposals.why_qwen_mass_may_improve: Isolating ordinal numerals from aspectual phase verbs prevents cross-category logit suppression.

repair_proposals.risk: Adding local context may slightly reduce detector precision for isolated prepositions.
repair_proposals.why_qwen_mass_may_improve: Providing a shared preceding participle normalizes syntactic expectations and equalizes preposition probabilities.

proposal.summary: Proposed verb regrouping, ordinal/phase-verb splitting, and participle-prefix context repair to equalize base Qwen next-token mass across skewed micro-slot buckets.
